allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /linkedin|twitter|instagram|x$/i.test\(k\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /^\(Linked|Linked|Linked|Insta|insta\)/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,10\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /^Linked/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,5\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k === 'LinkedinIcon' || k === 'LinkedInIcon' || k === 'Linkedin' || k === 'LinkedIn'\).join\(', '\)\)")
